The '''MixRMastR''' was a series of [[Bartender droid/Legends|bartender droid]] designed and built by [[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]]. It was the most common bartender model on the market, followed closely by [[LeisureMech Enterprises/Legends|LeisureMech Enterprises']] [[C5 bartender droid|C5]]. Vaguely humanoid in appearance, the MixRMastR was a common sight in [[Cantina/Legends|taverns]] located within or near busy [[Spaceport/Legends|starports]], where repeat business was valued less than efficient service.

==Description==
MixRMastR [[Bartender droid/Legends|bartender droids]] were just less than one [[Meter/Legends|meter]] in height and designed to be fixed directly onto a bar, table, or countertop. Once in place, tubes ran from the base of the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] into the floor, connecting to containers that were filled with common [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] beverages and other liquids such as [[Soda water/Legends|soda water]].<ref name="EGTD" />

A MixRMastR's [[Droid brain/Legends|droid brain]] had several separate components rather than a single processor. Each had a particular function; one module was an [[accounting database]] that tallied customer's bar tabs and kept them up to date. Another part was the [[drinks database]] that processed a customer's order.<ref name="FF57" />

[[File:MobileMixRMastr-FFp46.png|thumb|left|250px|A mobile repulsorlift model of MixRMastr]]
Drink orders were taken by the MixRMastR, and the droid consulted the extensive library of drink recipes programmed into it to draw the appropriate ingredients from the underground vats into<ref name="EGTD" /> an internal mixer<ref name="FF57" /> before being poured into a glass. The drinks were dispensed through a hatch on the front of the droid, and [[Currency/Legends|money]] was collected in the same manner.<ref name="EGTD" /> In the event that a patron attempted to take the drink without paying, [[Manipulator arm/Legends|manipulator arms]] were used to hold the individual until they paid up.<ref name="FF57" /> 

The MixRMastR was designed to be affixed to every table throughout a bar, resulting in multiple bartender droids serving the clientele. However, some businesses could not realistically afford to purchase a large number of MixRMastRs. To cater to this need, [[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]] manufactured a mobile variant of the MixRMastR that was equipped with a [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] unit with a three-and-a-half meter flight ceiling to navigate busy bars.<ref name="EGTD" /> Since this version of the droid was not connected to the underground drums of alcohol, the mobile MixRMastR had to carry a supply of drink with them. These supplies had to be replenished on a regular basis.<ref name="FF57" />

==History==
Cybot Galactica's MixRMastR was the most popular bartender droid in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], with [[LeisureMech Enterprises/Legends|LeisureMech's]] [[C5 bartender droid/Legends|C5]] model in a close second.<ref name="EGTD" />
